description: Coulson, May, and Ward converge on the stopped train with local agents, searching for their missing team members. In the abandoned luggage car, Simmons is found just waking up and disoriented; Fitz and Skye are unaccounted for. Coulson and Ward interrogate Simmons for information, as concern mounts over the missing duo’s whereabouts, highlighting the vulnerability of the team after the chaotic turn of events.

transcript.line: Wha...? Where are Fitz and Skye?
As we round the bend, the passengers on the North side of the train...
